allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d='node_modules/@lucide/svelte/dist/icons'; const f=fs.readdirSync\(d\).filter\(x=>x.endsWith\('.svelte'\)\).map\(x=>x.replace\('.svelte',''\)\); const want=['git','hub','linke','tube','twitch','insta','twit','face','book','video','music']; want.forEach\(w=>{const hits=f.filter\(n=>n.includes\(w\)\); if\(hits.length\) console.log\(w,'=>',hits.slice\(0,8\).join\(', '\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d='node_modules/@icons-pack/svelte-simple-icons/icons'; const f=fs.readdirSync\(d\).filter\(x=>x.endsWith\('.svelte'\)\).map\(x=>x.replace\('.svelte',''\)\); console.log\('linkedin:', f.filter\(n=>n.toLowerCase\(\).startsWith\('silinked'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('X exact:', f.includes\('SiX'\)\); console.log\('github exact:', f.includes\('SiGithub'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d='node_modules/@icons-pack/svelte-simple-icons/icons'; const f=fs.readdirSync\(d\).filter\(x=>x.endsWith\('.svelte'\)\).map\(x=>x.replace\('.svelte',''\)\); console.log\('contains link:', f.filter\(n=>n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\)\).slice\(0,15\).join\(', '\)\)")
